description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure adorned with elaborate headgear and surrounded by a series of metallic rings or bands that encircle the upper torso and shoulders. The figure appears to be dressed in draped garments, with detailed folds and a sense of movement in the fabric. The headgear is ornate, featuring two prominent upward projections, possibly stylized feathers or horns. The metallic rings vary in thickness and color, with one prominent gold-toned band inscribed with markings or text. The surface of the sculpture is predominantly a weathered, dark greenish-bronze, suggesting patinated metal. The overall form is dynamic, with the rings creating a sense of motion and energy around the otherwise stoic figure.
description: A standing human figure with ornate headgear is encircled by metallic rings, including a gold-toned inscribed band, all rendered in weathered bronze tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, detailed headgear, and the full arrangement of metallic rings, with the gold band most visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the headgear and the overlapping rings, with the gold band curving downward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the draped garment's back and the way the rings encircle the figure from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the headgear and the layered effect of the rings, with the gold band partially visible.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure with ornate headgear and encircling rings
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
